OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

Firstly, I've set a strict rule for myself - I only follow reputable news sources and organizations, and I make sure to verify the information I read before sharing it. I've also limited my social media use to specific times of the day, when I can devote my full attention to it. response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: As a self-employed translator living in Bari, I've always been cautious about the information I consume online, especially when it comes to social media. With the rise of fake news and propaganda, it's become increasingly difficult to distinguish between fact and fiction. However, I've developed a few strategies to manage and deal with fake content on social media. Firstly, I've set a strict rule for myself - I only follow reputable news sources and organizations, and I make sure to verify the information I read before sharing it. I've also limited my social media use to specific times of the day, when I can devote my full attention to it. This helps me to avoid mindless scrolling and reduces the likelihood of me coming across fake content. Another strategy I employ is to engage in critical thinking. I read beyond the headlines, and I try to understand the context and potential biases behind the information. I also like to fact-check, especially when it comes to sensitive topics like politics and health. I use reputable fact-checking websites and organizations to verify the information, and I make sure to share accurate information to combat the spread of fake content. Lastly, I've made it a point to engage in offline activities, like cooking and photography, which have helped me to maintain a healthy balance between my online and offline life. I believe that these strategies have been effective in helping me to manage and deal with fake content on social media, and I hope that they can be of use to others as well. I've come to realize that it's not just about being vigilant, but also about being informed and critical. By doing so, we can create a more nuanced and accurate understanding of the world around us, and we can work towards a more informed and responsible online community.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: I set a rule to follow reputable news sources and verify information before sharing it. I limit my social media use to specific times of the day to avoid mindless scrolling. I engage in critical thinking and fact-checking, especially for sensitive topics. I maintain a healthy balance between online and offline life by engaging in offline activities.
